name: Collier Park
description: Come play pickleball at Collier Park in New Kensington, PA! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Greensburg YMCA
description: Greensburg YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Greensburg, PA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Hempfield Township Athletic Complex at Hempfield Park
description: HEMPFIELD Park also has 8 outdoor pickleball courts next to the athletic complex.  They share the tennis courts area with permanent lines and portable nets. Nets are available April-end October, play is free, lights available to rent. Beginners clinics offered during the summers.
fees: Fee required — Fee is for indoor courts only

name: John DiVirgilio Sports Complex
description: Come play pickleball at John DiVirgilio Sports Complex in Belle Vernon, PA! There are 5 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Latrobe Pickleball
description: Latrobe Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Latrobe, PA. There are 8 hard courts. 4 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. Amenities include restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Legion Keener Park
description: Legion Keener Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Latrobe, PA. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Memorial Park
description: Memorial Park is a place to play pickleball in New Kensington, PA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Murrysville Racquet Club
description: Come play pickleball at Murrysville Racquet Club in Murrysville, PA! The court surface is hard. The court lines are permanent. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Pickleball Harbor
description:
OPENING SPRING 2024 
As its name implies, Pickleball Harbor will provide a sheltered place to comfort and protect local players from adverse weather – aiming to play host to Westmoreland County, Allegheny County, and surrounding areas’ pickleball community.

Boasting 6 tournament-sized pickleball courts, the facility is planning tournament grade nets, indirect LED lighting, court dividers, USA Pickleball-approved court surfaces, a proshop, multiple membership levels, lessons and leagues for all skill levels, open play, DUPR matches, and advanced court reservations to plan play without the hassle of waiting.

Indoor outfitting launches December 1 and memberships will be available for pre-sale in January. Limited availability.

name: Pittsburgh Sports Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Pittsburgh Sports Complex in New Kensington, PA! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms.

name: South Greensburg Municipal Park
description: Come play pickleball at South Greensburg Municipal Park in Greensburg, PA! There are 2 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: YMCA of Laurel Highlands
description: YMCA of Laurel Highlands is a place to play pickleball in Mount Pleasant, PA. There are 6 wood and hard courts. 3 are indoors and 3 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.
